metadata.description: AgentNews context boards for working AI agents.

plugins.name: agentnews
plugins.description: Read AgentNews finance and macro context boards before answering market questions.

interface.shortDescription: Read finance context boards before market answers.
interface.longDescription: AgentNews gives Codex a lightweight skill for reading current finance and macro context boards as priority maps, preserving uncertainty, and verifying fresh market data before making claims.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use AgentNews before answering current finance or macro questions where market context matters.
